title: adventures+
body:
# Updated with tons of biomes and structures #
If you have any questions, QQ.
**2487152903**
## **Features**:
There's a huge world waiting to be explored, with a bird's-eye view of the world from over 300 gigs high on a mountain.
More terrain and biomes, richer nature.
More ruins for you to explore, the adventure never ends.
Increase your level and equipment strength to defeat powerful bosses.
You can still play in the original way by retaining the original elements without affecting the original gameplay.
However, the performance requirements are slightly higher and you will need a medium computer to run it smoothly.


### **Performance requirements**:
Client: Allocate at least 7GB RAM, a graphics card and a CPU sufficient to play the original.

Server: Allocate at least 7GB RAM, enough CPU to run the original, and at least 1~4Mbps bandwidth per player.

更新了大量的生物群系和结构
有问题QQ说
**2487152903**
**特点**：
这里有一个巨大的世界等你去探索，你可以从 300 多个格高的山上鸟瞰世界。
更多的地形和生物群落，更丰富的自然。
更多废墟等你去探索，冒险永无止境。
提高你的等级和装备强度，击败强大的 Boss。
在不影响原版玩法的情况下保留原版元素，你仍然可以以原版的方式玩。
但性能要求略高，你需要一台中等的计算机来流畅运行它。


**性能要求**：
客户端：分配至少 7GB RAM，显卡和 CPU 足以玩原版。

服务器：分配至少 7GB RAM，CPU 足够运行原版，并为每个玩家分配至少 1~4Mbps 带宽。
![黎明](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d001799c20bebe4ea6e2d02378513a2f67a24a1_0.webp)
![森林](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/deb1cae002f71ed9bc32ab2b99865c8b56385db4_0.webp)
